title: bromus alopecuros subsp. biaristulatus
intro: Bromus alopecuros subsp. biaristulatus, also known as bearded brome or a subspecies of the bearded brome grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is reported to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions. The plant is believed to have health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Bromus alopecuros subsp. biaristulatus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
